description_long: This object is a pair of scissors featuring two elongated, straight metal blades joined at a central pivot. The handles are made of blue plastic, forming two large, oval-shaped loops for finger placement, with a smooth and slightly contoured design for comfort. The blades are metallic, with a matte to semi-gloss finish, and taper to a pointed tip for precision cutting. The central joint is a visible rivet, securing the blades together and allowing them to pivot smoothly. The handles are symmetrical and appear ambidextrous, suitable for both left- and right-handed users. There are no visible brand markings or logos on the handles or blades.
description: A pair of blue-handled scissors with straight, pointed metal blades and symmetrical oval finger loops. The handles are plastic, and the blades are joined by a visible rivet.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the scissors, with both blue handles and the straight, pointed metal blades clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the oval finger loops and the narrow profile of the blades, with the handles appearing prominent.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the blue handles and the straight blades from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the handles and the alignment of the blades, with the finger loops most visible.
attribute_handle_type: Symmetrical, oval-shaped, ambidextrous handles made of smooth blue plastic with no visible padding or special grip features.
attribute_blade_joint_type: Visible rivet joint, non-adjustable, standard fixed pivot design.
attribute_finger_loop_design: Two large, equal-sized oval loops with smooth surfaces, designed to accommodate multiple fingers comfortably, no soft inserts or anatomical contours.
attribute_blade_tip_style: Pointed blade tips designed for precision cutting.
